method: Rule-based mapping from detected metric_type to actionable recommendation satisfying all 5 required components.
requirement_met: action verb + target + from->to + confidence + evidence link
confidence_note: Confidence values below are illustrative of the response structure. In production the engine computes confidence at runtime from the EWMA breach ratio (app/engine.py _recommend: 0.6 + 0.15*(ratio-1), capped at 0.99) — it is not a fixed constant.

test_cases.recommendation: SCALE_UP (Action) RDS Database (Target) from db.r5.large to db.r5.xlarge (From->To). Confidence: 0.85 (runtime-computed). Evidence: https://obs.internal/tnt-1?metric=cpu_usage_percent
SCALE_UP (Action) SQS Worker Concurrency (Target) from 10 to 25 (From->To). Confidence: 0.85 (runtime-computed). Evidence: https://obs.internal/tnt-1?metric=queue_depth
